Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
158 
MDCD_ALOWD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Total Medicaid Allowed Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The claim level maximum amount determined by the payer as being “allowable” under the provisions 
of the contract prior to the determination of actual payment. 
SHORT NAME: MDCD_ALOWD_AMT 
LONG NAME: MDCD_ALOWD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
LT header
